testcase.name: testRestoreOperatorFailure
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO ai.hybridstream.connector.grpc.FlinkConnectorServiceImpl - RestoreOperator: id=test-operator type=VehicleDetector snapshot=test-snapshot-key [main] ERROR org.junit.jupiter.engine.execution.InvocationInterceptorChain$ValidatingInvocation.proceed(InvocationInterceptorChain.java:131) at
